[+] Execution halted due to exception after 29 cycles.

=== ARCHITECTURAL STATE (CYCLE 29) ===
x0:    0 | x1:    0 | x2: -1380 | x3:    0 | x4:    0 | x5:    0 | x6: -1972 | x7:  -71 |

Branch Predictor Stats: 0/0 correct.
